reason: Draft contains claims that lack literal quotes or ledger backing.

failed_claims.draft_text: omits the fundamental kinematic Jacobian dy/dη = p/E
failed_claims.error: Mathematical formula mismatch. Draft uses p/E, ledger uses p/(mT cosh η).
Cutoff threshold mismatch. Draft states 0.45 GeV, ledger states 0.50 GeV.

failed_claims.draft_text: Our verification confirms this reduces χ2 by 40-95% while preserving the physical temperature trend.
failed_claims.ledger_text: Applying the unfolding matrix shifts the kinetic freeze-out temperature T_{kin} by up to 4.7 MeV... A real ALICE MC-derived response matrix is confirmed necessary
failed_claims.error: Hallucination. Ledger never claims a 40-95% reduction in χ2.

action_required: Halt the pipeline and demand human review.
